title: Notifications - Low Battery
scenario: Low battery notification appears when a paired device with <5% battery is power-cycled while the Poly Lens app is in the background, and tapping the notification redirects to the app home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and pair a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Ensure the paired device has less than 5% battery remaining.
3. Press the Power button on the device to turn it off.
4. Send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
5. Press the Power button on the device to turn it back on.
6. Observe the notification area for a low battery notification.
expected: A low battery notification reading "Device has a low battery" appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
